title: Computer Game Design

prerequisites.text: Admission to BSc Hons specialising in Computer Science or Information Technology. Computer Graphics at third year level.

outline: This course will introduce students to the techniques and technologies used in designing and programming computer games and related applications. It introduces high-level game programming concepts and practical game construction. Course content include: terminology, methods and tools for computer game development; fundamental algorithms for 2D game development; design and development of simple 3D and networked games; uncertainty and constantly changing gaming environments; and techniques for multiuser and distributed games. Students collaborate with designers and artists to produce a full game.
